'''Nosstrick''' was a winged [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]].

==Biography==
Nosstrick worked for [[Jerresk]] and attacked several [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] supply shipments, earning very large [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]], moving him from the ''[[Hundred Club]]'' to the list of "Most Wanted". [[Jodo Kast]] tracked Nosstrick to [[Fluwhaka]] and shot him with [[frinka venom]] to ensure a live bounty.

[[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]] also tracked Nosstrick to Fluwhaka, only to discover that Kast had nearly fallen for one of Nosstrick's traps. Initially believing Kast to be [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], Dengar was very surprised, but only until he realized he wasn't dealing with Fett. Reluctantly, Dengar left, allowing Kast to get the bounty on Nosstrick.

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: Twin Engines of Destruction]]'' {{1st}}
